title: corynephorus canescens f. viridis
intro: Corynephorus canescens f. viridis, also known as the green hair grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Corynephorus canescens f. viridis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and naturopaths.
